lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Raamkalee Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇ ਮਨਾ ਖਿਨੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: har har dhiaae manaa khin na visaareeai |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, O mind; don't forget Him, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮਾ ਰਾਮ ਰਮਾ ਕੰਠਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: raam raamaa raam ramaa kantth ur dhaareeai |
lines.english: Enshrine the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam, Raam, within your heart and throat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: aur dhaar har har purakh pooran paarabraham niranjano |
lines.english: Enshrine within your heart the Primal Lord, Har, Har, the all-pervading, supreme, immaculate Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਦੀਸ ਈਸ ਗੋੁਪਾਲ ਮਾਧੋ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jagadees ees goupaal maadho gun govind veechaareeai |
lines.english: Contemplate the Lord of the World, the Cherisher of the World, the Lord, the Virtuous Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਪਾਪ ਹਰਤਾ ਦੁਸਹ ਦੁਖ ਭਵ ਖੰਡਨੋ ॥
lines.translit: bhai door karataa paap harataa dusah dukh bhav khanddano |
lines.english: He sends fear far away; He is the Destroyer of sin; He eradicates the unbearable pains of the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਆਧਾਰੁ ਜਨ ਕਾ ਆਸਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal aadhaar jan kaa aasaraa |
lines.english: His lotus feet are the support and anchor of His humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਚਿਤਾਰੀਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak mil sang saadhoo dinas rain chitaareeai |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, remember the Lord, day and night. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸ ਰੂਪ ਰੰਗ ਅਨੰਤ ਬੀਠਲ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਧਿਆਇਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: ras roop rang anant beetthal saas saas dhiaaeinaa |
lines.english: They meditate on the Infinite Lord with each and every breath, as their pleasure, joy and beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਲੁ ਮਿਲਖ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਨੰਤ ਧਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: maal milakh bhanddaar naam anant dharaa |
lines.english: He takes the Naam, the Name of the Infinite Lord, as his wealth, property and treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਰਹਰ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਏਕ ਨਰਾਇਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam narahar nidhaan jin kai ras bhog ek naraaeinaa |
lines.english: Those who have the treasure of the Lord's Name, enjoy the taste of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਹਰਣਾ ਨਾਮ ਪੁਨਹਚਰਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ਹਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kilavikh haranaa naam punahacharanaa naam jam kee traas haraa |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the Destroyer of sins, the only deed of redemption. The Naam drives out the fear of the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਨਈ ॥
lines.translit: gun beant suaamee tere koe na jaanee |
lines.english: Your Glorious Virtues are endless, O my Lord and Master; no one knows them all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਸਿ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲਹ ਆਸਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak raas jan kee charan kamalah aasaraa |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, the support of His lotus feet is the capital of His humble servant. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਤੁਝੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਪੁਰਖਪਤਿ ਪਰਮੇਸਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh tujh dhiaaveh purakhapat paramesaraa |
lines.english: All beings and creatures meditate on You, O Primal Transcendent Lord, Master of men.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਚਲਤ ਦਇਆਲ ਸੁਣਿ ਭਗਤ ਵਖਾਨਈ ॥
lines.translit: dekh chalat deaal sun bhagat vakhaanee |
lines.english: Seeing and hearing of Your wondrous plays, O Merciful Lord, Your devotees narrate them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਤੁ ਸੁਜਾਣੁ ਸੋਈ ਜਿਸਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀ ਮਾਨਈ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sant sujaan soee jiseh prabh jee maanee |
lines.english: He alone is holy, a Saint, a truly wise person, who is accepted by the Dear Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜਾਚਿਕ ਏਕੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕਰੁਣਾ ਮੈ ਜਗਦੀਸਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sarab jaachik ek daataa karunaa mai jagadeesaraa |
lines.english: All beings are beggars; You are the One Giver, O Lord of the Universe, Embodiment of mercy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਹੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸੋਇ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਪਛਾਨਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak karahu kirapaa soe tujheh pachhaanee |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, they alone realize You, unto whom You show Mercy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਅਨਾਥੁ ਸਰਣੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mohi niragun anaath saranee aaeaa |
lines.english: I am unworthy and without any master; I seek Your Sanctuary, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਆ ਕੁਸਲੁ ਥੀਆ ਸਰਬ ਇਛਾ ਪੁੰਨੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur naam deea kusal theea sarab ichhaa puneea |
lines.english: The Guru blessed me with the Naam; happiness came, and all my desires were fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bal bal bal guradev jin naam drirraaeaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice, a sacrifice to the Divine Guru, who has implanted the Naam within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਨੇ ਬੁਝਾਈ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਆਈ ਮਿਲੇ ਚਿਰੀ ਵਿਛੁੰਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jalane bujhaaee saant aaee mile chiree vichhuniaa |
lines.english: The fire of desire has been quenched, and peace and tranquility have come; after such a long separation, I have met my Lord again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨੰਦ ਹਰਖ ਸਹਜ ਸਾਚੇ ਮਹਾ ਮੰਗਲ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aanand harakh sehaj saache mahaa mangal gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: I have found ecstasy, pleasure and true intuitive poise, singing the great glories, the song of bliss of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak naam prabh kaa gur poore te paaeaa |4|2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I have obtained the Name of God from the Perfect Guru. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਸਭਿ ਦੋਖ ਬਿਨਾਸਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੀਐ ਗੁਰ ਮੰਤਨ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: kilavikh sabh dokh binaasan har naam japeeai gur mantan kai |
lines.english: All sins and sufferings are erased, chanting the Lord's Name, under Guru's Instructions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁਣ ਝੁਣੋ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਨਾਹਦੁ ਨਿਤ ਉਠਿ ਗਾਈਐ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: run jhuno sabad anaahad nit utth gaaeeai santan kai |
lines.english: Rise early each morning, and with the Saints, sing the melodious harmony, the unstruck sound current of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਗ ਦਾਨ ਅਨੇਕ ਕਿਰਿਆ ਲਗਿ ਚਰਣ ਕਮਲਹ ਸਾਧੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jog daan anek kiriaa lag charan kamalah saadheeai |
lines.english: The merits of Yoga, charity and religious rituals are obtained by grasping His lotus feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੀਜੈ ਅਮਿਉ ਪੀਜੈ ਰੈਣਿ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਅਰਾਧੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: har naam leejai amiau peejai rain dinas araadheeai |
lines.english: Dwell upon the Lord's Name, and drink in the Nectar; day and night, worship and adore Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਰੈ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਨਰਹਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak tarai saagar dhiaae suaamee naraharai |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, cross over the world-ocean, meditating on the Lord, your Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਦਇਆਲ ਮੋਹਨ ਦੂਖ ਸਗਲੇ ਪਰਹਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhaau bhagat deaal mohan dookh sagale paraharai |
lines.english: Loving devotion to the merciful, enticing Lord takes away all pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਸਿਮਰਣੁ ਭਗਤ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਤੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sukh saagar gobind simaran bhagat gaaveh gun tere raam |
lines.english: Meditation on the Lord of the Universe is an ocean of peace; Your devotees sing Your Glorious Praises, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੇ ਪਾਏ ਸੂਖ ਘਨੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: anad mangal gur charanee laage paae sookh ghanere raam |
lines.english: Ecstasy, bliss and great happiness are obtained by grasping hold of the Guru's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਦੂਖ ਹਰਿਆ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਰਾਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sukh nidhaan miliaa dookh hariaa kripaa kar prabh raakhiaa |
lines.english: Meeting with the treasure of peace, their pains are taken away; granting His Grace, God protects them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਚਿਤਵੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har ek chitavai prabh ek gaavai har ek drisattee aaeaa |
lines.english: He thinks of the One Lord, and he sings of the One God; he gazes upon the One Lord alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਲਾਗਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਭਾਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har charan laagaa bhram bhau bhaagaa har naam rasanaa bhaakhiaa |
lines.english: Those who grasp the Lord's feet - their fears and doubts run away, and they chant the Name of the Lord.
